docs.text: <style> body { text-align: justify; text-justify: inter-word; text-decoration: dashed; } h1 { text-align:center } h2 {text-shadow: 5px; color:rgb(255,196,93); text-decoration: dashed; } Courses & Certificates DeepLearning.AI TensorFlow Developer : ( DeepLearning.AI on Coursera ) From this Specialization, I have learned how to build and train neural networks using TensorFlow, how to improve network performance using convolutions as we train it to identify real-world images, how to teach machines to understand, analyze, and respond to human speech with natural language processing systems, and more, as these and other TensorFlow concepts are going to be at the forefront of the coming transformation to an AI-powered future. Machine Learning : ( Stanford University on coursera ) This course builds the basics of the machine learning. Python for Everybody Specialization : (University of Michigan on coursera ) This Specialization builds on the success of the Python for Everybody course and will introduce fundamental programming concepts including data structures, networked application program interfaces, and databases, using the Python programming language. Skills Programming Languages : C, Python Librares : Pandas, Numpy, Scikit-learn, Matplotlib, Seaborn, Tensorflow, Keras Communication : English, Urdu, Kashmiri Others : DataScience, Arduino, LaTex , Markdown

docs.text: body { text-align: justify; text-justify: inter-word; text-decoration: dashed; } h1 { text-align:center } h2 {text-shadow: 5px; color:rgb(255,196,93); text-decoration: dashed; } Work Experience Rhic Innovation LLP ( 2018 – 2021 ) ( Project Instructor ) The primary goal of the company is Research and Development in Internet of things(IOT), Machine Learning, Artificial Intelligence and Deep Learning. I worked here as a project instructor to various students and guided them in various AI based simple projects . Robotics Research Centre ( IIIT-Hyderabad ) ( 2017 ) ( Research Trainee Under Prof. Madhava Krishna ) The IIIT Robotics Lab is a part of International Institute of Information Technology Hyderabad,India. The lab aims to works on research problems and innovative projects. I worked here as an intern on the problem of Image Based Visual Servoing. IBVS is the technique to control the motion of the robot by using the computer vision data in the servo loop. This was done on simulator called as Gazebo. TCIL - IT, Chandigarh ( 2016 ) ( Internship Program ) Telecommunications Consultants India Limited is a government of India owned engineering and consultancy company under the administrative control of the Departmentof Telecommunications, Ministry of India. I worked here as a trainee. In this training, I enriched myself with the basic knowledge of Networking and telecommunications.
docs.title: Work Experience
